titles.en: al-Qāsim b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAlī b. Yaqṭīn, Abū Muḥammad
al-Qāsim b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAlī b. Yaqṭīn, Abū Muḥammad

segments: 4 – al-Qāsim b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAlī b. Yaqṭīn, Abū Muḥammad.  Settled in Qum.  We recognize his ḥadīth and we deny them.  The Qummis mentioned: indeed in his madhhab there is irtifāʿ.  Most of what is upon him is good.
en.tashayyu.text: 4 – al-Qāsim b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAlī b. Yaqṭīn, Abū Muḥammad.  Settled in Qum.  We recognize his ḥadīth and we deny them.  The Qummis mentioned: indeed in his madhhab there is irtifāʿ.  Most of what is upon him is good.

narratorChain.raw: 4 - القاسم بن الحسن بن علي بن يقطين، أبو محمد، سكن قم. حديثه نعرفه، وننكره. ذكر القميون: أن في

parts.text: القاسم بن الحسن بن علي بن يقطين، أبو محمد، سكن قم. حديثه نعرفه، وننكره. ذكر القميون: أن في
